_metadata.description:
Join us for the second episode of Plone Hands On! In this session, our experts David Ichim and Victor Fernández de Alba, will show how you can customize the theme of your site, through the web, with the latest Volto.

RELATED LINKS: 
https://plone.org/  

CONNECT: 
Website: https://plone.org/  
X:  https://twitter.com/plone 
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/plone-foundation/ 
Mastodon: https://plone.social/@plone 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/plonecms/ 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/plonecms 
Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/plone.org 

https://plone.org/community 

Sign up to the Plone Newsletter – comes out every two months (and easy to unsubscribe if it’s not useful to you). 
https://plone.org/news-and-events/join-the-plone-newsletter 

ABOUT 
Plone is an open-source content management system that is used to create, edit, and manage digital content, like websites, intranets and custom solutions. It comes with over 20 years of growth, optimisations, and refinements. The result is a system trusted by governments, universities, businesses, and other organisations all over the world.

The Plone Foundation protects and promotes Plone by furthering the development, marketing, and legal affairs of Plone and the Plone community.

WANT TO WORK WITH PLONE 
Try Plone today https://demo.plone.org/
